VERIFICATION

Confold is published by the software author (Juan García Longarón) on GitHub:
  https://github.com/confold/confold/releases/tag/v0.5.0

This package downloads the official Windows installer and verifies its SHA256:

  File:   Confold_0.5.0_x64-setup.exe
  SHA256: FF051F5D8700FD394A55768427DF70878124E0CAF95DAE92D19884619E339CD9

To verify the checksum yourself:

  PowerShell:
    Get-FileHash .\Confold_0.5.0_x64-setup.exe -Algorithm SHA256

  GitHub CLI:
    gh release view v0.5.0 --repo confold/confold --json assets `
      --jq '.assets[] | select(.name | endswith("x64-setup.exe")) | .digest'

The bundled LICENSE.txt is a copy of the project's Apache-2.0 license:
  https://github.com/confold/confold/blob/main/LICENSE
